member.name: T:CSM_Player.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:CSM_Player.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:CSM_Player.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:CSM_Player.My.Resources.Resources._stop
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type DevExpress.Utils.Svg.SvgImage.
